# dotenvx

Use this when you need encrypted env workflows, multi-environment loading, or secure runtime env injection.

---

## Installation

```bash
npm install @dotenvx/dotenvx
```

Alternative:

```bash
yarn add @dotenvx/dotenvx
pnpm add @dotenvx/dotenvx
bun add @dotenvx/dotenvx
```

---

## Quickstart

### Node.js

```js
require('@dotenvx/dotenvx').config()
// or import '@dotenvx/dotenvx/config'
```

### CLI (any language)

```bash
dotenvx run -- node index.js
```

---

## Core Commands

Run default `.env`:

```bash
dotenvx run -- <command>
```

Load specific file:

```bash
dotenvx run -f .env.production -- <command>
```

Multiple files:

```bash
dotenvx run -f .env.local -f .env -- <command>
```

Override order:

```bash
dotenvx run -f .env.local -f .env --overload -- <command>
```

---

## Encryption Workflow

Encrypt file:

```bash
dotenvx encrypt
```

Run encrypted:

```bash
DOTENV_PRIVATE_KEY_PRODUCTION="your_key" dotenvx run -f .env.production -- <command>
```

### Git rule

```gitignore
.env.keys
```

👉 Jangan pernah commit `.env.keys`

---

## Variable Expansion

```ini
USERNAME="alice"
DATABASE_URL="postgres://${USERNAME}@localhost/mydb"
```

---

## CI/CD Example

```yaml
env:
  DOTENV_PRIVATE_KEY_PRODUCTION: ${{ secrets.DOTENV_PRIVATE_KEY_PRODUCTION }}

run: dotenvx run -f .env.production -- node index.js
```

---

## Best Practice

* Jangan commit `.env`
* Gunakan `.env.example`
* Simpan key di environment / secret manager
* Gunakan encryption untuk production

---

## Typical Use Cases

* Production deployment
* Multi environment config
* Team sharing env
* Secure CI/CD

---
